lines.original: Membaca lagi surat-suratmu hatiku jatuh rindu
lines.translation: Reading your letters again makes my heart fall in love

lines.original: Tak sadar pada langit kamarku ku lukis kau di situ
lines.translation: Not realizing that on the ceiling of my room I painted you there

lines.original: Waktu yang berlalu dan jarak masih saja terentang
lines.translation: Time passes and distance still stretches

lines.original: Penamu bicara menembus ruang menyapa sukmaku
lines.translation: The speaker penetrates the room and greets my soul

lines.original: Mendesah lembut angin membawa butiran hati lara
lines.translation: The gentle sigh of the wind carries grains of pain in my heart

lines.original: Ternyata meraih kesempatan tak semudah ku sangka
lines.translation: It turns out that getting the opportunity is not as easy as I thought

lines.original: Kau setia menunggu lelaki kecil menantang hidup
lines.translation: You faithfully wait for the little man to challenge life

lines.original: Kau sertakan doa seolah mantra menjelma nafasku
lines.translation: You included a prayer as if a mantra became my breath

lines.original: Memendam tanya segera terucap
lines.translation: Buried questions immediately came out

lines.original: Belahan jiwa apa kabarmu
lines.translation: Soulmate how are you

lines.original: Ku harap selalu tetap kau jaga
lines.translation: I hope you always take care of it

lines.original: Tumbuhan cinta yang di ladang kita
lines.translation: Love plants in our fields

lines.original: Oh
lines.translation: Oh

lines.original: Aku jauh di sini menggapai cita
lines.translation: I'm far away from achieving my goals

lines.original: Hingga satu saat nanti ku kan kembali oh
lines.translation: Until one day I'll be back oh

lines.original: Kan ku jemput dikau sang putri pada saatnya nanti
lines.translation: I'll pick you up the princess when the time comes

lines.original: Berkereta kencana ku bawa pergi tuju istana di sana ku bertahta
lines.translation: I took the carriage away to the palace where I reigned
